# ColoringPalace

ColoringPalace is a premium directory of high-resolution, vector-grade free printable coloring pages in PDF format. Designed for kids, parents, teachers, and meditative adult relaxation.

## Category Map

- Animals & Wildlife: https://coloringpalace.cloud/category/animals
- Dinosaurs & Prehistoric: https://coloringpalace.cloud/category/dinosaurs
- Fantasy & Fairy Tales: https://coloringpalace.cloud/category/fantasy
- Flowers & Botanicals: https://coloringpalace.cloud/category/flowers
- Geometric Mandalas: https://coloringpalace.cloud/category/mandalas
- Holidays & Seasons: https://coloringpalace.cloud/category/holidays
- Nature & Landscapes: https://coloringpalace.cloud/category/nature
- Ocean & Marine Life: https://coloringpalace.cloud/category/ocean
- Space & Astronomy: https://coloringpalace.cloud/category/space
- Vehicles & Transport: https://coloringpalace.cloud/category/vehicles
- Anime & Manga: https://coloringpalace.cloud/category/anime
- Zodiac & Astrology: https://coloringpalace.cloud/category/astrology
- School & Education: https://coloringpalace.cloud/category/education
- Cute & Kawaii: https://coloringpalace.cloud/category/kawaii

## Core Features

1. **One-Click Printing:** Direct, high-resolution vector PDF downloads.
2. **Branded Coming Soon:** Real-time generation of requested slots.
3. **Optimized Layouts:** Easy navigation, search autocomplete, and mobile-first design.
